case_title: ROSEMARY C. PALI VS. LARRY GOPPERT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2008 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAY-27-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFECTIVE SERVICE - NOT SERVED 15 DAYS PRIOR TO TRIAL DATE (MAY 8, 2008). DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITHPREJUDICE AS TO LARRY GOPPERT AS IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY, BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-27-2008 AT 1:30PM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2008 - JUDGMENT. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH NEGLIGENCE OF DEFENDANT AURA SKIN SPA #1, INC. WITH THE CONSENT OF THE PARTIES, THE COURT AMENDS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO CORRECTLY NAMED AURA SKIN SPA AS DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT LARRY GOPPERT DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PALI, ROSEMARY C. AS TO DEFENDANT AURA SKIN SPA #1, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $74.50) SERVED MAY-08-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AURA SKIN SPA #1, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALI, ROSEMARY C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AURA SKIN SPA #1, INC. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2008 - JUDGMENT. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH NEGLIGENCE OF DEFENDANT AURA SKIN SPA #1, INC. WITH THE CONSENT OF THE PARTIES, THE COURT AMENDS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO CORRECTLY NAMED AURA SKIN SPA #1 AS DEFENDNANT. DEFENDANT LARRY GOPPERT DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
